questionHtml: Calculate the power of the output signal after the signal has travelled a distance of 3.40 km in the fibre.
markschemeHtml:
attenuation = –1.24 × 3.4 «= –4.216 dB»

–4.216 = 10 log I 15

I = 5.68 «mW»

 

Need negative attenuation for MP1, may be shown in MP2.

For mp3 answer must be less than 15 mW (even with ECF) to earn mark.

Allow [3] for BCA.

[3 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the power of the output signal after the signal has travelled a distance of 3.40 km in the fibre.
